arts.ttl: Arne Slot faces Liverpool headache with trusted ally wanted for managerial role
arts.sum: Liverpool are flying high in the Premier League but are facing a number of challenges off the field in head coach Arne Slot's first season in charge at Anfield after replacing Jurgen Klopp

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's secret weapon behind Liverpool title charge laid bare by Marco van Basten
arts.sum: Dutch legend Marco van Basten has revealed the secret behind Arne Slot's blistering start to life at Liverpool, who are six points clear at the Premier League summit and boast a game in hand over rivals Arsenal and Chelsea, respectively

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold is already a Liverpool legend and one of the best creative players in the world... it's a crying shame English football has never fully appreciated him, writes OLIVER HOLT
arts.sum: OLIVER HOLT: It is a culture war and a propaganda war. It is a battle to avoid blame. It is a struggle to preserve allegiances and restate tribal loyalties

arts.ttl: West Ham United vs. Liverpool: Arne Slot to beat Julen Lopetegui, boost Premier League title hopes
arts.sum: Liverpool should be confident of brushing aside West Ham United on Sunday in the Premier League and effectively wrap up the Premier League title.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand insists Arne Slot is NOT the Premier League's manager of the season so far in a heated debate with Owen Hargreaves - as he claims the Liverpool boss took over a 'wonderfully settled ship' last summer
arts.sum: The former Man United team-mates fought in two manager's corners, and came to blows over which boss is more deserving of the Premier League Manager of the Season award so far.

arts.ttl: I played Premier League's best-ever player - he's given Mo Salah reason to stay at Liverpool
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is among the greatest players ever to grace the Premier League, but Thierry Henry is the consensus best after excelling for Arsene Wenger's Arsenal

arts.ttl: Five Trent Alexander-Arnold replacements Liverpool could sign amid Real Madrid transfer links
arts.sum: Liverpool face losing Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid next year, and while they have Conor Bradley as the other right-back at the club, the Reds signing a like-for-like replacement would be necesary
